description: Detects rows whose parsed cell count differs from the dominant table width or separator width.
why_it_indicates_an_error: PDF extraction failures often insert or remove cell boundaries, causing row width mismatch or hidden column collapse.

description: Detects tokens or words unnaturally split across adjacent cells, such as 'Wai | ved' or 'tr | ansaction'.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Column separators introduced inside a continuous token are a strong signal of bad segmentation.

description: Detects adjacent rows that likely belong to one source row because the first ends in an incomplete phrase.
why_it_indicates_an_error: PDF row boundaries are commonly broken when wrapped text or multi-line labels are misread as separate rows.

description: Detects cells containing multiple peer values concatenated together.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Collapsed columns produce dense cells with repeated monetary or status values that should occupy distinct columns.

description: Detects suspicious symbol substitutions and OCR artifacts in value cells.
why_it_indicates_an_error: OCR and parser noise often corrupt simple symbols used in tables, especially checkmarks and footnote markers.

description: Detects cells ending in stray punctuation or formatting residue.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Extraction pipelines often leak formatting markers or line-ending debris into cell text.

description: Detects missing, reordered, merged, or malformed footnote markers.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Footnotes are frequently damaged during PDF-to-Markdown conversion.

description: Detects rows in mostly numeric columns where a cell lacks an expected monetary or categorical value.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Column shifts and OCR loss commonly drop or displace numeric values in otherwise regular financial tables.

description: Detects cases where header rows, subheaders, or caption rows are embedded as data rows.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Table structure corruption often starts in the header, causing all subsequent rows to map against the wrong columns.

description: Detects low-likelihood text fragments or rows with character patterns unlike neighboring rows.
why_it_indicates_an_error: OCR noise can invent content not present in the source PDF, especially in dense tables.

description: Detects abruptly cut labels, broken words, or incomplete footnote prose.
why_it_indicates_an_error: Row clipping, column overflow, and OCR failure frequently remove leading or trailing text fragments.

description: Detects separate logical tables or sections merged into one Markdown table.
why_it_indicates_an_error: When adjacent PDF tables are flattened into one, headers, row semantics, and widths become inconsistent.
